question_text: Tick bite or tick found attached?
Tick attached for 36 hours or longer (or unsure)?
Bullseye or expanding ring rash (erythema migrans)?
Joint swelling or severe joint pain?
Heart palpitations, chest pain, or fainting?
Rash spreading rapidly or multiple rashes?
Tick removed but mouthparts may remain?
Bite area is increasingly red, hot, painful, or pus?
Known exposure in endemic area (woods/grass, pets)?
Cold exposure occurred (outdoors, wet clothing, poor heat)?
Confusion, sleepiness, or not acting normal?
Skin is pale/blue, numb, hard, or blistering (frostbite)?
Irregular heartbeat or very slow heartbeat?
Wet clothing or immersion in cold water?
Severe weakness or inability to walk?
Severe blistering or black skin (necrosis concern)?
No access to safe warm shelter now?
